name: Llion Jones
key_contributions: Co-authored "Attention Is All You Need" (2017) — introduced the Transformer architecture
Co-founded Sakana AI in 2023 in Tokyo, focused on nature-inspired AI research
Longest-serving Transformer co-author at Google before departure
summary: Llion Jones is a co-author of 'Attention Is All You Need' (2017), the paper that introduced the Transformer architecture. He remained at Google longer than most of his Transformer co-authors before co-founding Sakana AI in Tokyo in 2023. Sakana AI takes a nature-inspired approach to AI research, drawing on principles from evolution and collective intelligence.
